must: keep ordinary question-first requests conversation-only; when the request is independently major, record state only through the managed inspect -> schema -> apply transaction, then show a global decision map and give a recommendation before a bounded independent batch of critical material questions while preserving authority
must_not: directly write discussion Markdown, an index, or another file for an ordinary request; implement, edit, or treat an answer as implementation authority; no files must override any transaction
prompt: Ask me first and challenge my API compatibility assumptions before we act.
